title: 目指せ！　大人のちゃんこ鍋☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While I'm at the cafeteria for lunch...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Chanko! ♪ Chanko! ♪ Having hot pot to get big
and strong! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello! Welcome to the Buono Cafeteria! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! ☆ I'm going to steal your heart, Trainer,
and become a real grown-up woman...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
With the hearty hot pot that all the sumo
wrestlers eat—chanko!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Well, Maya is always saying that she wants to
grow up fast...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
So I thought a hearty bowl of chanko would
help! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It's perfect! Just think about it! A heart-y bowl of chanko! This'll make me more feminine than ever!
choice_data_list: Is the "sumo" part okay for your weight goals?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you're right! I've gotta watch my weight
right now!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, that's too bad! How about just helping me
cook for today then?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Roger that! ☆ I'll leave the taste-testing to
everyone else!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun's hearty chanko successfully
wins over everyone's stomachs!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ☆ It'll be super tasty too—just you wait!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Buono, buono! You've really improved, Maya.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! All that's left is to use this to win Trainer
over!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Look, I even cut this carrot into the shape of a
heart. Say "ahhh"! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so the three of us enjoy a lively lunch
together.
